args:
set -eu
explain_json=$(mktemp)
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- explain --format json --region prefill_attention --readiness correctness > "$explain_json"
python3 - "$explain_json" <<'PY'
import json, sys
obj = json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))
regions = [region['name'] for region in obj['plan']['compile_regions']]
assert regions == ['prefill_attention'], regions
assert obj['verification']['status'] == 'Passed', obj['verification']['status']
assert obj['plan']['structural_identity']['plan_identity']
assert obj['diagnostics']['diagnostics']
PY
printf 'scoped-explained\n'
